subcodes.first_line: Hompa Karunga gwange, Karunga gwange! Kerera vapika Woge vakulimburuke noyidovauka yomonomutjima vapopera neho Lyoge lyo
subcodes.notes: Same unity prayer as diu/TMP00581 -- "Hompa Karunga gwange, Karunga gwange! Kerera vapika Woge vakulimburuke..." Appears in both Otjiherero (hz) and Rugciriku (diu) parallel Namibian prayer books, section NDAPERO NKA DIMWE (Unity). No English equivalent found in inventory. May be locally composed or very obscure AB tablet.
